title: Align PMM PromQL/Inventory clients with v0.2.1 monitoring probe — skip TLS verify by default
originDiscussion: Rocky 234 deploy of v0.4.3 — /databases external PMM panel showed 'unreachable' while /monitoring showed 'PMM 連線正常' against the same https://192.168.199.234:18443 URL

scope.fix: Flip default for MONITORING_PMM_TLS_SKIP_VERIFY env var from 'false' → 'true' so PromQL + Inventory clients skip TLS verification by default (matches v0.2.1 monitoring.service probe).
scope.resolveConfigRewrite: Switch from OR semantics to settings-then-env cascade so an explicit setting key 'monitoring.pmm_tls_skip_verify=false' still wins over the new env default.
scope.noUiChange: Existing setting key + env var remain operator-tunable. Anyone with a real LE/internal-CA cert can flip back to verify-on explicitly.

verification.test: pass — existing tests still pass (they pass tlsSkipVerify explicitly so default flip doesn't affect them)

rocky234SymptomBeforeFix: /databases external panel banner: 'PMM 無法連線，請確認 URL 及網路狀態。' (error.reason='unreachable'). /monitoring page: 'PMM 連線正常, latency 10ms'. Drawer 4-card PMM summary similarly broken (same PromQL client TLS posture).
rocky234ExpectedAfterFix: External panel populates with PMM-monitored DBs (or shows empty/auth banner if API token missing). Drawer 4-card summary renders real values (or 'not registered' hint if the instance was never pmm-admin add'd).
